headline: Don't export engagement. Own it.
description: Shopping is rarely a solo decision. By embedding shared shopping directly into your store, you capture the social dynamics of buying and transform them into engagement, insights, and revenue.

features.title: Shop together
features.description: A native, real-time co-shopping experience embedded directly in your webshop. Enables customers to shop together, accelerating decision-making while increasing engagement and average order value within your own commerce environment.

features.title: Group-Driven Incentives
features.description: Activate group-based offers that reward collective purchasing. Drives incremental revenue and viral growth by turning social behavior into a scalable commercial lever—without disrupting existing promotion structures.

features.title: On-Site Social Interaction
features.description: Built-in social interactions such as shared carts and live feedback keep customers engaged throughout the buying journey. Reduces drop-off by keeping social decision-making on-site instead of on external platforms.

features.title: Fast & Scalable Web Integration
features.description: Lightweight web integration via script or platform plugins (e.g. Shopify), designed for rapid deployment and minimal engineering effort. Scales across brands and markets without compromising site performance.
